---
title: "Welcome to the DKU Wiki"
subtitle: "The unofficial, student-led colloquial knowledge hub about living at DKU."
---


## Introduction 

Get started with: 

- [Dining](/dining/dining.html)

## About the project 

The **DKU Wiki** is an initiative led by the DKU Computer Science Club to serve as a knowledge hub for up-to-date information regarding campus life
